commit.message:
Fix flaky test "LocalWriteSuite" (#144)

* fix flaky test and update pom artifact

* init pr
fix Array[String] for SequenceExample (#140)

Add udf DataFrameTfrConverter (#132)

* Add udf DataFrameTfrConverter

- allows to create serialized tf records from all columns of a DataFrame
- this is useful to do Tensorflow inference on tf records exactly the same way as tf records creation
- added Python inference example to README.md

* Use SharedSparkSessionSuite for creating SparkContext

* Provide example for inference use case on dataframe with tf records, estimator and vectorized udf

- Requires Spark 2.4, Tested compatibility with the jar that is in spark 2.3

add new `codec` option for compression in Spark-Tensorflow connector (#131)

* support option 'codec' for compression

* add `codec` option to README

Remove testWriteSmallZippedTfRecords (#127)

- there seems to be some non deterministic behavior when writing gz files
- remove testWriteSmallZippedTfRecords

Add tfrecord gzip compression (#125)

- added in TFRecordFileInputFormat & TFRecordFileOutputFormat
- improved unit tests to handle both cases
- didn't change TFRecordFileOutputFormatV1 (couldn't test and not used by SparkConnector)

Shade tensorflow-hadoop jar (#122)

* Shade tensorflow-hadoop jar

* Testing with email id verified by CLA

Update DefaultTfRecordRowEncoder to be compatible with Spark 2.4 (#100)

* update DefaultTfRecordRowEncoder to be compatible with Spark 2.4

* change Spark version back to 2.3.1 but keep the snapshot repo for easy testing

Add an example to run multi-worker training with distribution strategies. (#99)

* Add an example to run multi-worker training with distribution strategies.

* Larger title in readme.

* Update readme.

* jinga -> jinja

* background -> experience

* file -> files

* Add more comments to tf_std_server.py

Revert artifact IDs for Hadoop and Spark jars (#98)

Revert the artifact IDs to tensorflow-hadoop and tensorflow-spark-connector
Fixing javaDocs errors (#96)

[Hadoop/Spark]: Add Javadoc artifacts to pom.xml (#93)

Required to be able to hose these in Maven Central (via
oss.sonatype.org)

Add PySpark example to Spark TensorFlow connector README (#92)

* Add PySpark example to Spark TensorFlow connector README

* Reformat PySpark example for Spark TensorFlow connector

Add links to Kubefow to the ecosystem docs. (#89)

* Add links to Kubefow to the ecosystem docs.

* Delete extra space
Upgrade Spark version from 2.2.1 to 2.3.0 in Spark connector (#88)

Update artifact ids for Spark and Hadoop jars (#87)

* Change the artifact IDs for TensorFlow Hadoop and Spark jars

* Test deployment using snapshot repo

* Revert "Test deployment using snapshot repo"

This reverts commit 737638898628738fe35415364e28e0a9e664de9f.
Add deployment profiles for TensorFlow Hadoop and Spark connector (#83)
Update the url of the hadoop file (#78)

Updated Spark and Hadoop builds to use published TensorFlow java jars (#74)

* Updated Spark and Hadoop builds to use published TensorFlow java jars

* Delete repository section in Spark TensorFlow connector pom

[spark-tensorflow-connector] Add support for reading BytesList TFRecord data into BinaryType columns (#73)

* WIP

* WIP, stuff works now but need to add tests

* WIP

* WIP, all tests pass

* Cleanups

* Update README

* Update TensorFlowSuite

Local writes for the Spark TensorFlowConnector (#71)

* added local writes

* change

* cleanup

* documentation

* comments
Remove invalid comma from the marathon template (#70)
Fix image link in Mesos README.md (#68)

Add support for encoding BinaryType directly to BytesList (#63)

* Add support for encoding BinaryType directly to BytesList

This also affects the codepath used when encoding StringType. Strings
are now converted to Array[Byte] further upstream, then passed to
BytesListFeatureEncoder, which now takes Array[Byte]. This should
be transparent to users.

* Add BinaryType to list of supported Spark DataTypes
Add TFRecordFileOutputFormatV1 to support MRv1 (#58)
Respect BytesWritable#getLength in TFRecordFileOutputFormat (#57)
Add mode support while saving dataframes (#55)

Add support for vectors, decimals, and nullables to Spark TensorFlow connector (#53)

* Add support for decimal types and nullables to Spark TensorFlow connector

* Fix error message for nullables in Spark TensorFlow connector

* Update Spark TensorFlow connector README

* Add StringType to list of supported types in README
Fixing broken link in README (#54)

Add support for SequenceExample to Spark TensorFlow connector (#52)

* Decode and encode SequenceExample feature lists to Spark SQL rows

* Added format to specify recordType while writing dataframes

* Add unit tests for SequenceExample and fix sql datatype for BytesList

DataType for BytesList changed from StringType to ArrayType(StringType)

* Add tests for sequence example

* Update tests and README example for importing TensorFlow SequenceExample

* Update README for Spark TensorFlow connector

* Update recordType in README for Spark TensorFlow connector

* Fix handling of integers in SequenceExample export

* Add schema inference for SequenceExamples in Spark
initial swarm support (#50)

Upgrade protobuf version for TensorFlow Hadoop to 3.3.0 (#49)

* Upgrade protobuf-java version from 3.1.0 to 3.3.0

* Update TensorFlow Hadoop compile instructions for different protobuf version

Update README.md (#46)

A drive-by update of MD link formatting
Fixing README so that between-graph replication image renders. (#45)
New Distributed TensorFlow link (#41)
Use universal container (#38)
Move Spark TensorFlow connector to subfolder spark-tensorflow-connector (#37)

Add Spark Tensorflow Connector  (#34)

* Add spark-tensorflow-connector to ecosystem

* Update Readme

* Add feedback changes

Shade protobuf dependency to fix version conflicts with Apache Spark (#30)

Apache Spark uses an older version of the protobuf library included
in Apache hadoop-common. This fix uses Maven shading to resolve the
version conflicts.
Update README.md to add protobuf requirement (#23)
K8s secret should be created from file (#21)
README fixes (#20)
Add Hadoop InputFormat/OutputFormat for TFRecord feature file (#18)
Convert the MNIST example to use best practices (#17)
Update between-graph replication diagram and readmes. (#16)
Fix a typo in the main README (#15)
Move image and mention flags in Marathon README. (#14)
Pin the Docker images to a specific TensorFlow version. (#10)
Kubernetes README (#12)
Add the initial README (#8)
Docker README (#11)
Create README for marathon/mesos. (#9)
Take input from a file argument in render_template.py. (#7)
Kubernetes template (#6)
Move docker files to docker dir. (#5)
mnist docker files and training program. (#4)
Add marathon template and a jinja template renderer. (#3)
Initial commit
